common.exportFailed: Export failed: {{error}} — check Settings if your CLI is signed in.

sidebar.reindexTooltip: Rescan all workspaces for new conversations
sidebar.noMatchesDesc: Try broadening your query or clearing filters.
sidebar.noSessionsDesc: Run reindex from the header once your Cursor workspace has conversations.

aiTagger.buttonTooltip: Auto-tag the currently filtered sessions with AI
aiTagger.modalDescription: AI reads each session's user messages and produces 1-3 tags appended to existing ones.
aiTagger.alreadyTaggedHint: {{count}} of them have already been AI-tagged and will be skipped
aiTagger.noEligible: No sessions match the current filter
aiTagger.providerNotConfigured: Configure an AI provider in Settings first.
aiTagger.providerOpenaiNotReady: ChatGPT not signed in — open Settings
aiTagger.providerCursorNotReady: Cursor not signed in — open Settings
aiTagger.modelRecommendOpenai: Tagging output is just 1-3 tags. Pick a lighter model like GPT-5.4 mini for better speed and cost.
aiTagger.modelRecommendCursor: Cursor CLI takes ~20s per call. Try a lighter model like gpt-5.4-mini-low / gpt-5.5-medium.
aiTagger.includeAlreadyTaggedDesc: Skipped by default; enable to re-run and overwrite previous AI tags
aiTagger.extractStrategyDesc: Picks which user messages are sent to the AI
aiTagger.strategyFirstHint: Best when intent is set up front
aiTagger.strategyFirstLastHint: Best for medium conversations with bookended intent
aiTagger.strategyAllHint: Best for short sessions where the whole thing fits
aiTagger.privacyNotice: Only the user messages are sent to the AI provider — assistant replies stay local.
aiTagger.vocabHint: {{count}} existing tag(s) the AI will prefer to reuse.
aiTagger.vocabEmpty: No existing tags yet — seed a few manually first so AI re-use is more stable.
aiTagger.overflowHint: Max {{limit}} per run. Took the first {{limit}}; rerun for the remaining {{remaining}}.

session.selectConversationDesc: Pick any thread from the panel on the left, or search across every repository to begin.
session.cursorOmitsOutput: Cursor source omits tool output by design
session.timestampEstimatedTip: Cursor's chat log has no per-event timestamps. The session's start/end are real, but every message time you see is estimated by spreading messages evenly across the session window.

export.exportTooltip: {{label}} – generated with the default AI provider in Settings
export.generatingAI: Generating Smart {{kind}} via AI… this can take ~30s
export.smartFallback: Smart {{kind}} fell back to basic template{{reason}} · {{fileLine}}
export.writeDescription: We'll generate the markdown via your default AI provider and drop it straight into the project repository. Edit the destination below if our guess isn't quite right.
export.lookingUp: Looking up the project repo for this session…
export.notGitRepo: not a git repo (you can still write here)
export.cantAutoDetect: Couldn't auto-detect this session's repo. Pick a folder manually.
export.fileAlreadyExists: File already exists. We'll ask before overwriting.
export.fileExistsError: A file with this name already exists at the target path.
export.noSubfolders: No subfolders. Click "Use this folder" to pick {{path}}.
export.hiddenFolders: Hidden folders are filtered out for clarity.
export.repoSourceSession: Inferred from the session's working directory
export.repoSourceDecoded: Decoded from the Cursor project name

more.copySessionIdHint: Copy the raw session_id to the clipboard.
more.downloadJsonlHint: Save the original transcript file so you can share it with a maintainer for debugging.
more.deleteSessionHint: Permanently remove the transcript file and local annotations.

delete.deleteTooltip: Delete this session (and its transcript file)
delete.confirmBody: This will permanently delete the transcript file on disk (including associated sub-agents and local annotations). This action cannot be undone.

image.tempClearedDetail: The original clipboard/temp file was automatically deleted after the session
image.unavailableDetail: Original file not found — it may have been moved or is outside allowed directories
image.dataLoadFailed: Could not decode embedded image data

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage AI providers used by Smart Export, Ask AI, and future cross-session insights. Tokens stay with their CLI: codex stores them in isolated codex-homes, cursor-agent in macOS Keychain. Reunion never persists raw tokens.
settings.defaultProviderDesc: Smart Export and Ask AI both fall back to this provider when no override is specified.
settings.openaiRoutesDefault: Routes to your default ChatGPT account.
settings.modelDesc: Smart Export and Ask AI fall back to this model. Leave on the provider default to mirror the CLI's /model selection.
settings.noModels: No models reported by the CLI yet — sign in or run cursor-agent --list-models manually to verify.
settings.reasoningEffortDesc: How hard the model "thinks" before answering. Mirrors model_reasoning_effort in ~/.codex/config.toml.
settings.modelDefaultHint: Don't override · let the API decide
settings.notReasoningModel: {{model}} is not a reasoning model — effort will be silently ignored by the API. Pick a gpt-5.5 family model to enable thinking.
settings.serviceTierDesc: Routes the request to the priority or flex pool. Auto = leave it to your plan (matches codex CLI's service_tier).
settings.tierFlexHint: Higher quotas, slower · cheaper for batches
settings.openaiAccountsDesc: Each account gets an isolated CODEX_HOME. Multi-account safe.
settings.noChatGPTDesc: Click "Add ChatGPT account" to spawn codex login against an isolated CODEX_HOME. Make sure the codex CLI is installed.
settings.reloginTooltip: Re-run codex login for this account
settings.removeConfirm: Remove this ChatGPT account? Reunion will delete its codex-home and forget tokens.
settings.cursorAgentDesc: Single-account only — tokens live in macOS Keychain, managed by cursor-agent.
settings.cursorCliNotFoundDesc: Install Cursor desktop and ensure cursor-agent is on PATH. Then come back and click "Login Cursor".
settings.keychainNote: tokens stored in macOS Keychain by cursor-agent
